intro: Melicope munroi, also known as Munro's lemon myrtle, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in alleviating symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions.
